race.comment: LUKEY BLUE (7) got off the mark over 1100m at Gatton last start, scoring by 1.5 lengths. Re-unites with Micheal Hellyer who was on board last start. Capable of taking the next step. UCELLE (13) finished 3.5 lengths from the winner in fifth over 1200m at this track last start, a less impressive effort than her first-up fourth at Kilcoy the run before. Best figures measure up nicely and is sure to run well. ALL TOO FOXY (8) tasted defeat last start when fifth over 1200m at Ipswich, beaten 2.5 lengths. Has the ability to take this out. GERRY'S PICK (2) showed good early dash and raced on the speed at the first run back from a break last start before fading to finish 6 lengths back in sixth over 1200m at Beaudesert. Has ability and a bold showing is expected.
